name: NetMap
desc: NetMap is a self-hosted tool that gives you a proper overview of your home lab or small network. Map out your devices, track IPs, watch for things going down, …
descFull: NetMap is a self-hosted tool that gives you a proper overview of your home lab or small network. Map out your devices, track IPs, watch for things going down, and dig into firewall logs, all from one place, running on your own hardware.
